steps.title: Find the slope using the two given points
steps.content:
Apply the slope formula with $(2, 10)$ and $(8, 0)$:
$$m = \frac{10 - 0}{2 - 8} = \frac{10}{-6} = -\frac{5}{3}$$

steps.title: Find the equation and identify the y-intercept
steps.content:
Use point-slope form with $(8, 0)$ and slope $-\frac{5}{3}$:
$$y - 0 = -\frac{5}{3}(x - 8)$$
$$y = -\frac{5}{3}x + \frac{40}{3}$$
Since the y-intercept occurs when $x = 0$, we have $b = \frac{40}{3}$.
The answer is 13.333,40/3.
